title: tractema liliohyacinthus
intro: Tractema liliohyacinthus, also known as Trachymene lilio-hyacinthina, is a flowering plant species in the carrot family (Apiaceae) native to Australia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine, particularly in Western Australia, for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Tractema liliohyacinthus include its ability to reduce fever, treat skin conditions, and alleviate respiratory issues. The plant is typically prepared as a herbal remedy by making a tea from its leaves and flowers or using it in a tincture form.
